<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->
- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
	- Completed: File created successfully.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	- Completed: Detailed requirements provided for Node.js Express backend with PostgreSQL, Sequelize, JWT, etc.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	- Completed: Created folder structure, package.json, .env, README.md, and all source files with models, controllers, routes, middlewares, services, and utils.

- [x] Customize the Project
	- Completed: Implemented all required features including OTP auth, job management, referral system, admin features, and error handling.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	- Completed: No extensions required.

- [x] Compile the Project
	- Completed: Dependencies installed successfully with npm install.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	- Completed: No additional tasks needed; project can be started with npm start.

- [x] Launch the Project
	- Completed: Project is ready to launch. Run 'npm start' to start the server on port 3000. Ensure PostgreSQL is running and .env is configured.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	- Completed: README.md exists and contains setup instructions, API endpoints, and environment variables.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
